transcript.text:
I'm craving something more upscale
So I'm going to eat some steak
[Welcome]
How would you like your steak cooked?
Medium-rare, please
[6 Steaks]
[Coming right up]
[Tender Slice]
[An elegant meal]
[How about some pasta for dessert?]
[Elegant... meal]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Gangneung today to shoot a TV show
I was thinking if I should eat seafood here at Gangneung
But I was kind of craving something more upscale
so I'm here for some steak

I'm going to eat some expensive steak today
So excited!
[Chodang Bistro located in Gangneung]
Hello
I can smell something that smells like popcorn in here
The menu
There are 6 steaks here
Let's eat all of them
Let's add something else to that
[I need some time]
I can't decide
Then!
[I need more time]
Don't I have to drink something like an -ade here?
There's a lemonade
[Got it]

[1 wild meerkat giving a signal]
Eye laser!
No one's here
[Well then]
1 order of coke too
What can I get you started?
Do I just show you this?
Are you ordering all of these as singles? Yes
How would you like your steaks cooked?
Medium-rare, please
[Let's see]
[Wait a minute]
2.6kg of steak
Impossible for a normal human being
But I believe she can do it
Here's some popcorn as an appetizer

Thank you
They served me popcorn
We give popcorn instead of bread Really?
Thank you
They serve popcorn
No wonder the place smelled like popcorn
This is my favorite brand of popcorn It's really good
Here.. Ka..
Ke.. Something Land
I hear it all the time, but I forget
This tastes really good
So good
I think it was Kilkland(?), but I don't think that was it
What was it again?
[Google is your best friend]
Right, Kirkland

Why is it Kirk?
[I'll let that slide because it tastes good]
[Shall we cook some steak now?]
[Oil it right up]
[Salt salt salt salt salt]
[Seasoning complete]
[Put them on the grill]
[Some cuts near the bones]
[Steak party]
[With cute garnishes]
[T-bone]
[Tomahwak]
[Galbi steak]
[Top blade]
[Tenderloin]
[Chuck flap tail]

[A whole set of steaks!]
Thank you
[Never-ending plates of steak]
That's a lot
[Never-ending]
All 6 of them are out now
Looks so good
What was this? Tenderloin?
[Help me!]
I know what these are, but what were these again?
This one is Chuck Flap Tail
This is Top Blade, and that's Tenderloin
Thank you
This is Galbi Steak (ribs)
This is Tomahawk
This is Porterhouse T-bone

Chuck Flap Tail
Top Blade and Tenderloin
It's so nicely cooked
Bon appetit!
I want to hurry and eat
It cuts like butter
It's cooked perfectly just how I like it
It tastes so good that I bit my tongue
I think it's going to bleed I bit it real good
On my very first bite
This tastes so good though
[She looks very satisfied]
It really just melts in my mouth Like really
It's amazing
Top blade
1 bite

The scent and the seasoning is very nice
Very tender
It's also very juicy
Personally,
I like the tenderloin more
It has a different texture
But it's tasty
Chuck Flap Tail
I really love this part
Look how juicy it is It's dripping
This one is really amazing
It really juicy Full of meat juice
[Buffering]
That crunchiness of chuck flap tail
That very taste
I'd like it to be a little saltier

I like salty foods
I'm so happy right now
There are cooked garlic here too I love it
Oyster mushrooms
Garlic tastes so good too
T-bone!
Bon appetit
You're supposed to eat the Tomahawk steak with your hands
A little embarrassing to do it here
How about just 1 bite?
It's so tender
This is the tender part of the meat
It's called ribeye cap there
It's really tasty
It's shaped like a shrimp
It's the best part

Most valuable and tasty part
This melts in my mouth
This is the best part
This part is the sirloin
This part can get a little dry after some time
Tomahawk is really delicious
Galbi (rib) this time
Looks tasty
That grease
It cuts so well
Let's eat this in 1 bite
You know those rib meats full of grease
This part has the most grease
It's just that tasty because of it
Let's just finish up the tenderloin here
I think tenderloin is the best kind of steak to eat fresh off the grill

The tomahawk ribeye cap as well
It's been sitting here for a while, but it's still very good
This might be today's best steak
Where did all my steak go?
I ate it too fast
[Owner steps in] Hello!
How's your steak? It's really good
I noticed you were just eating steak
And was wondering if I can possibly serve you some Jjampong soup (Spicy seafood soup)
I would love that
Thank you Thank you even more
Jjampong soup here at a steak house?
I was not craving any soup, to be honest
Because the steak was really good
The tenderloin is just really savory
No grease, but melts in my mouth

Chuck Flap Tail is just tasty
The jelly-like tenderness
The meat is just delicious
Tomahawk is really nice
There are a lot of places that only have good ribeye caps
But the sirloin part here is really tender and delicious
Sirloin tend to get dry and tough to chew after some time
I need to save the Chuck Flap Tail for later
How is it still this tender?
So weird
Tenderloin is really good
Look at the color
Here Jjampong Pasta on the house!
On the house? This much?
Are you okay with that? Yes of course
Don't just eat the meat

It's hot so be careful Thank you
On the house...
It's pasta
It's really big
Thank you
It's really good
People said that everything here is good, including the pasta
There were great reviews on the blog
It's really good
[Burn hazard]
[Emergency aid]
That's hot
That surprised me
It goes really well with the steak
Although it was great by itself
It washes down.. Wash down what? it was perfect

[Did you already forget about us?]
I want to slurp the noodles with chopsticks
This is Jjampong
I don't have that much meat left
Let's eat a smaller piece this time
Galbi is really yummy too
Really Really
When she mentioned Jjampong I thought she would get it from delivery
But it was this kind of Jjampong
It's filled with shrimp and squid
The restaurant was just now full so I sat in the corner
This place is perfect for a date It has a very Hanok (Korea traditional) look
When do I go on a date?
[Rage gauge rises]
[Cool it down with steak]
So tasty

[Ahjussi (old man) sound]
Am I really at a steakhouse?
I can't help but make that sound
Don't order this when you're on a date
You'll make that sound
[Some orange juice]
Thank you
This has got to be the greatest mukbang here Really?
You really do eat well just like how I saw it on stream Thank you
This is not enough
Really
Everything's so good Even the tomatoes
This is delicious
Last bite of the steak!
Even the last bite is amazing
Why am I eating pasta like Jjampong?

This is actually not pasta really
Perfect for a hangover
That was great
I had some steak today
And it was very very good
It wasn't enough though I want more
I will have to hold back this time
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
